notes: Ethereum official Go implementation. L1 hardfork changes (EIPs, block header fields, blob APIs) propagate into mantle-xyz/op-geth (via fork chain) and mantle-xyz/mantle-v2 (via go.mod dependency replaced with their op-geth fork).
Optimism monorepo (OP Stack). mantle-xyz/mantle-v2 is a fork of this repo. OP Stack protocol changes — derivation, sequencer, fault proof, interop — directly affect Mantle v2.
OP Stack execution client (fork of go-ethereum). mantle-xyz/op-geth is a direct fork of this repo. New hardfork activations and EVM changes in op-geth must be tracked and rebased.
ZK proving for OP Stack rollups using SP1. mantle-xyz/op-succinct is a direct fork. Upstream proof system changes or OP Stack ZK compatibility updates must be rebased.

Paradigm's Rust Ethereum execution client. mantle-xyz/reth is a direct fork. Upstream reth releases — engine API changes, EVM updates, block execution logic — must be tracked and rebased into mantle-xyz/reth.

Rust OP Stack state transition and L2 derivation (no_std, FPVM/ZK compatible). mantle-xyz/kona is a direct fork. Upstream changes to derivation pipeline, preimage oracle, or fault proof interface must be tracked and rebased.
